title: FOUNDER_FIELD_AUDIT_TO_WORKFLOW_COMPILER — Canonical Spine v1
one_liner: A deterministic Voice-to-Workflow Compiler: founder SPEAKS defects on a real surface -> observations -> issue clusters -> deterministic WorkflowContracts -> sandbox jobs -> independently verified receipts -> approval-ready patches -> pattern expansion. NOT a chatbot or prompt generator.

authority_model.sina-governance-SSOT: law / registry / locks. Runs nothing. Owns the templates registry and risk policy this spine must obey.
authority_model.sandbox: authoring & R&D bench. authority=none. CANNOT mint PASS. Every write stays inside sandbox/products/field-audit-compiler-v1/. Sandbox jobs may only inspect / patch-into-a-diff / test / return receipts.
authority_model.noetfield-cloud-factory-infra: verified-execution factory. Thin orchestrators. The independent Cloudflare Worker verifier is the ONLY PASS issuer. Supabase is the ledger.
authority_model.cat-05-sandbox-worktree-execution: a factory WATCHER slot that runs the SandboxJob in an isolated worktree — NOT the whole sandbox.
authority_model.cat-09-receipt-trust-audit-layer: trust / receipt center of gravity; GUARD-class receipts promote here.
authority_model.execution_rule: All generated work goes to sandbox FIRST. NO direct deploy, merge, deletion, cron unlock, real send, or canonical-repo mutation from raw voice. Canonical changes require an ApprovalItem or an explicitly-scoped low-risk rule. Sandbox jobs run ONLY against the founder-supplied TARGET_URL/target_ref; never hardcode or fetch a live surface.
authority_model.pass_issuance: verifier_status=PASS is issuable ONLY by the independent CF Worker after it recomputes summary from checks[] and confirms edge + secondary-CF-account proof. Author-emitted sandbox receipts are always authority='none', verifier_status='UNVERIFIED'.

reads: VOICE_TO_OBSERVATION_SCHEMA_v1.json (stage-1 objects: AuditSession, VoiceNote, Transcript, Observation)

AuditSession.purpose: One founder audit pass against one target surface. Root of all foreign keys.

fields.name: target_url
fields.note: Founder-supplied TARGET_URL. One of target_url/target_ref required. Never hardcoded to a live surface.

fields.name: target_ref
fields.note: Git ref / repo path / workflow id for repo/workflow audits.

VoiceNote.purpose: One captured spoken utterance (audio reference) in a session.

fields.name: audio_ref
fields.note: Sandbox-local blob key; never an external URL.

Transcript.purpose: Deterministic-normalized text of one VoiceNote (raw + normalized + optional English translation).

Observation.purpose: One atomic asserted defect sliced from a Transcript; the compiler's structured unit. Unverified/heuristic.

fields.name: raw_span
fields.note: Exact substring of text_normalized/text_translated; provenance anchor.

fields.name: surface_ref
fields.note: Concrete pointer (route/selector/href/component) or 'unresolved:<hint>'. Never a hardcoded live URL at compile time.

fields.name: needs_translation
fields.note: True if span came from non-English transcript.

IssueCluster.purpose: Deduped grouping of Observations that share a defect_kind + resolved target scope; unit that a WorkflowContract is generated from.

fields.name: observation_ids
fields.note: FK -> Observation.id[] merged into this cluster.

fields.name: target_refs
fields.note: Resolved surface pointers in scope for this cluster.

WorkflowContract.purpose: The deterministic compiled contract generated from one IssueCluster. Pure, no-LLM checks a CF Worker can re-derive. This is what makes the system a COMPILER not a chatbot.

fields.name: target
fields.note: { target_url|target_ref, scope_selector } — founder-supplied ref + scope selector for the fan-out.

fields.name: params
fields.note: Template-specific params (e.g. canonical copy source, expected route).

fields.name: deterministic_checks
fields.note: [{name, logic, pass_condition}] copied/instantiated from the template.

fields.name: expected_outputs
fields.note: What a passing run looks like.

fields.name: verifier_logic
fields.note: How the CF Worker re-derives the result.

fields.name: pattern_expansion_rule
fields.note: How this contract fans across similar routes/components.

fields.name: promotion
fields.note: { factory_category, value_class } — where a verified receipt promotes.

fields.name: risk_class
fields.note: read_only never mutates; canonical_change always needs approval.

fields.name: approval_required
fields.note: True unless risk_class=read_only or an explicitly-scoped low-risk rule applies.

SandboxJob.purpose: Execution of one WorkflowContract inside the cat-05 watcher worktree. authority=none; inspects / patches-into-a-diff / tests / returns a receipt. Never deploys.

fields.name: target
fields.note: Same founder-supplied ref+scope as the contract.

fields.name: diff_ref
fields.note: Path to proposed patch diff (patch_diff jobs only). Never applied here.

fields.name: receipt_id
fields.note: FK -> Receipt (field_audit_receipt_v1) emitted by the VerificationRun.

VerificationRun.purpose: Runs the deterministic_checks and emits a field_audit_receipt_v1. In sandbox it self-writes UNVERIFIED; the independent CF Worker adjudicates PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED.

Receipt.purpose: The field_audit_receipt_v1 artifact (see RECEIPT_SCHEMA_FIELD_AUDIT_v1.json). Independently re-derivable by a CF Worker. Sandbox self-writes carry authority='none', verifier_status='UNVERIFIED'.

fields.name: summary
fields.note: {total,passed,failed}; verifier recomputes and FAILs on mismatch.

ApprovalItem.purpose: The human gate. A verified (or explicitly-scoped low-risk) result becomes an approval-ready patch. ONLY an approved ApprovalItem authorizes a canonical change — never raw voice.

fields.name: receipt_id
fields.note: FK -> Receipt that justifies this item.

fields.name: proposed_patch_ref
fields.note: FK -> SandboxJob.diff_ref (the diff to apply on approval).

target.scope_selector: CSS/route/glob selector defining the fan-out scope, e.g. 'nav a, footer a' or '/**' or 'button[data-cta]'

deterministic_checks.name: check name
deterministic_checks.logic: PURE no-LLM predicate — HTTP status | DOM/selector presence | regex | hash equality
deterministic_checks.pass_condition: boolean expression over the logic result

workflow_contract_shape.expected_outputs: { checks[] all passed, summary{total,passed,failed} } shape a passing run yields
workflow_contract_shape.verifier_logic: how a CF Worker RE-DERIVES: refetch/re-select/re-regex/re-hash, recompute summary from checks[], FAIL on mismatch; PASS requires edge+secondary-account proof
workflow_contract_shape.pattern_expansion_rule: deterministic fan-out: enumerate all elements matching scope_selector and instantiate one check per element
workflow_contract_shape.approval_required: boolean — false only for read_only or explicitly-scoped low-risk rule

templates.purpose: Detect hrefs that resolve to non-2xx/3xx or empty/'#' targets across a scope.

deterministic_checks.name: href_resolves
deterministic_checks.pass_condition: status in [200,301,302,308] AND href not in ['', '#', 'javascript:void(0)']

templates.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-fetches each href, recomputes passed booleans and summary from checks[]; FAIL on any mismatch.
templates.pattern_expansion: Fans to ALL nav + footer + in-body links matching scope_selector; one check per unique href.

templates.purpose: Verify a primary call-to-action element exists and its route/target resolves to a live 2xx page.
templates.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-selects the CTA in fetched HTML and re-fetches its href; recomputes summary; FAIL on mismatch.
templates.pattern_expansion: Fans to ALL CTAs (every [data-cta]/primary button) across the surface.

templates.purpose: Ensure required legal/compliance footer links (Privacy, Terms, Cookie) exist and resolve.

deterministic_checks.name: cookie_link_present_and_resolves
deterministic_checks.logic: footer selector match + HTTP GET target
deterministic_checks.pass_condition: link whose text/href matches 'cookie' exists AND status==200 AND href not in ['','#']

templates.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-parses footer, matches required names, re-fetches each; recomputes summary; FAIL on mismatch.
templates.pattern_expansion: Fans to ALL required legal links (privacy/terms/cookie/accessibility) in the footer.

templates.purpose: Verify sign-in / sign-up entrypoints exist and their routes return a working auth page (not 4xx/5xx).
templates.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-selects auth entrypoint in fetched HTML and re-fetches its route; recomputes summary; FAIL on mismatch.
templates.pattern_expansion: Fans to ALL auth entrypoints (header sign-in, footer sign-in, in-body CTAs to login/signup).

templates.purpose: Verify offer/package copy on the surface matches the canonical SSOT offer text (name, inclusions).

deterministic_checks.name: offer_name_matches_canonical
deterministic_checks.logic: regex/string-equality of rendered offer name vs canonical

templates.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-fetches page + canonical source, re-normalizes, re-compares; recomputes summary; FAIL on mismatch. (No LLM — pure string/hash equality against a supplied canonical.)
templates.pattern_expansion: Fans across ALL commercial surfaces/pages that reference the offer (home, pricing, product, partner pages).

templates.purpose: Verify a specific price/duration claim on the surface equals the canonical value (e.g. $12,000 / 8-week).

deterministic_checks.name: price_matches_canonical
deterministic_checks.logic: regex extract price token, string-equality vs expected_price

deterministic_checks.name: duration_matches_canonical
deterministic_checks.logic: regex extract duration token, equality vs expected_duration

templates.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-fetches page, re-runs the same regexes, re-compares to canonical; recomputes summary; FAIL on mismatch.
templates.pattern_expansion: Fans across ALL commercial surfaces where the price/duration is claimed.

templates.purpose: Verify a request/correlation id is rendered to the user on relevant views (support/trust surfaces) so issues are traceable.

deterministic_checks.name: request_id_visible
deterministic_checks.logic: regex match against rendered text / attribute presence
deterministic_checks.pass_condition: id_regex matches rendered DOM text OR [data-request-id] attribute is non-empty

templates.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-fetches the view and re-runs the same regex over rendered text/attributes; recomputes summary; FAIL on mismatch.
templates.pattern_expansion: Fans across ALL views expected to show a request id (support pages, error states, receipt/trust views).

templates.purpose: Smoke-check the web chat widget: mount node present, input + send control present, ARIA/label sanity. UX signal, not a subjective judgement.

deterministic_checks.name: chat_controls_present
deterministic_checks.logic: DOM presence of input + send control

deterministic_checks.name: chat_input_labeled
deterministic_checks.pass_condition: input has non-empty aria-label OR placeholder

templates.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-fetches rendered HTML and re-selects widget + controls + attributes; recomputes summary; FAIL on mismatch.
templates.pattern_expansion: Fans across ALL pages that mount the chat widget (or the shared component instance).

templates.purpose: Smoke-check mobile viewport health: viewport meta present, no horizontal overflow, tap targets not sub-min.

deterministic_checks.name: viewport_meta_present
deterministic_checks.logic: regex on HTML head for <meta name=viewport>

deterministic_checks.name: no_horizontal_overflow
deterministic_checks.logic: headless measure scrollWidth vs innerWidth at 375px

templates.verifier_logic: CF Worker (or headless render service the Worker calls) re-measures at fixed viewport; recomputes summary; FAIL on mismatch. Heavier than pure HTTP — sequenced after the first five.
templates.pattern_expansion: Fans across ALL key routes (home, pricing, product, auth) at the fixed mobile viewport.

templates.purpose: Verify a set of key routes return 2xx and are non-empty (baseline liveness of the surface's spine).
templates.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-fetches each route, recomputes passed + summary from checks[]; FAIL on mismatch. Mirrors CAT-10 http_200 poller doctrine exactly.
templates.pattern_expansion: Fans across ALL discovered/declared key routes (sitemap or nav-derived).

first_five_rationale: Four (WC-1/3/5 seeds) are exercised by the canonical E2E and route_health_check is the baseline poller (broken_link_scan also appears via WC-2 fan-out); all five are purely deterministic with plain HTTP + static-DOM/regex logic a CF Worker already re-derives today (route_health mirrors the shipped CAT-10 http_200 poller). offer/pricing consistency need a supplied canonical source, and web_chat_ux + mobile_responsive need rendering — both sequenced after the first five.

e2e_example.note: SINGLE CANONICAL worked chain reused by every downstream file. Illustrative TARGET_URL is founder-supplied and shown as {TARGET_URL}; nothing here fetches a live surface. Compiled from the founder voice note verbatim.
e2e_example.founder_voice_note: Apply for Program link is broken. Cookie link goes nowhere. Sign-in is broken. Acme Brief twelve-thousand-dollar eight-week package copy needs update. Request IDs are not visible. Web chat UI is bad.

transcript.text_raw: apply for pilot link is broken cookie link goes nowhere sign-in is broken trust brief twelve thousand dollar six week package copy needs update request ids are not visible web chat ui is bad
transcript.text_normalized: apply for pilot link is broken. cookie link goes nowhere. sign-in is broken. trust brief $12,000 8-week package copy needs update. request ids are not visible. web chat ui is bad.

observations.raw_span: apply for pilot link is broken
trust brief $12,000 8-week package copy needs update

issue_clusters.label: Broken 'Apply for Program' CTA
issue_clusters.dedup_note: Single CTA observation; will fan to all CTAs via pattern expansion.

issue_clusters.label: Footer Cookie link goes nowhere
issue_clusters.dedup_note: Grouped under legal_footer_link (more specific than generic broken_link).

issue_clusters.label: Acme Brief $12,000 / 8-week copy stale
issue_clusters.dedup_note: pricing_claim chosen over offer_copy because the specific claim ($12,000, 8-week) is checkable against canonical; an offer_copy_consistency_check contract is spawned as a sibling in expansion.

workflow_contracts.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-selects CTA + re-fetches href; recompute summary; FAIL on mismatch.
workflow_contracts.pattern_expansion_rule: instantiate cta_route_check for every [data-cta] on the surface

workflow_contracts.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-parses footer + re-fetches; recompute summary; FAIL on mismatch.
CF Worker re-selects + re-fetches auth route; recompute summary; FAIL on mismatch.
workflow_contracts.pattern_expansion_rule: instantiate for every auth entrypoint (header, footer, in-body)

expected_outputs.interpretation: founder said copy needs update -> canonical mismatch expected until patched

workflow_contracts.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-fetches page + canonical, re-runs regexes, re-compares; recompute summary; FAIL on mismatch.
workflow_contracts.pattern_expansion_rule: instantiate across all commercial surfaces referencing Acme Brief price/duration; spawn sibling offer_copy_consistency_check

workflow_contracts.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-fetches view + re-runs regex; recompute summary; FAIL on mismatch.
workflow_contracts.pattern_expansion_rule: instantiate across all views expected to show a request id

workflow_contracts.verifier_logic: CF Worker re-fetches HTML + re-selects widget/controls/attrs; recompute summary; FAIL on mismatch.
workflow_contracts.pattern_expansion_rule: instantiate on every page mounting the chat component

checks.name: request_id_visible
checks.detail: no request-id pattern or [data-request-id] in rendered view

checks.name: chat_input_labeled
checks.detail: chat input missing aria-label and placeholder

approval_items.title: Fix broken 'Apply for Program' CTA route (404)
approval_items.rationale: Route returns 404; fix requires canonical change -> founder approval.

approval_items.title: Update Acme Brief copy to $12,000 / 8-week
approval_items.rationale: Diff prepared in sandbox; canonical copy change needs founder approval.

approval_items.title: Render request id on trust/support views
approval_items.rationale: Additive display element; low-risk patch, still queued for approval.

approval_items.title: Add aria-label/placeholder to chat input
approval_items.rationale: Accessibility label missing; low-risk additive attribute.

pattern_expansion.rule: fan to ALL required legal footer links + generic broken_link_scan over nav+footer
fan pricing/offer copy across ALL commercial surfaces
fan to ALL views expected to show a request id
fan to ALL pages mounting the chat component

e2e_example.chain_summary: 1 voice note -> 1 transcript (normalized: '$12,000','8-week') -> 6 observations -> 6 deduped clusters -> 6 WorkflowContracts (first-five templates seed WC-1/3/5 (WC-2 legal_footer_link_check is covered via broken_link_scan fan-out, sequenced later); WC-4 pricing, WC-6 chat sequenced later) -> 6 cat-05 sandbox jobs (3 inspect, 3 patch_diff) -> 6 verification runs -> 6 field_audit_receipt_v1 (ALL verifier_status=FAIL as expected: surface is genuinely broken) -> 6 pending ApprovalItems -> pattern expansion fans each template across siblings. No PASS self-minted; no canonical mutation; all diffs staged, none applied.

first_build_sequence.why: Founder must be able to SPEAK against a supplied target; entry point of the compiler.

first_build_sequence.what: Transcriber -> Transcript(text_raw, text_normalized, normalization_ops, optional translation).
first_build_sequence.why: Deterministic, replayable normalization is the substrate for extraction; not an LLM chat.

first_build_sequence.what: Observation extractor -> Observation[] (raw_span, target_hint, defect_kind, severity_guess).
first_build_sequence.why: Turns prose into atomic, kind-tagged units that map 1:1 to templates.

first_build_sequence.what: Clusterer -> IssueCluster[] (group + dedup by defect_kind + resolved target scope).
first_build_sequence.why: Collapses duplicate/overlapping observations into one contract each.

first_build_sequence.what: Template selector -> pick templates[].id per cluster (first_five first).
first_build_sequence.why: Deterministic routing from defect_kind to a proven pure-check template.

first_build_sequence.what: Contract generator -> WorkflowContract[] (target+scope, deterministic_checks, promotion, risk_class).
first_build_sequence.why: The compile step: emits the deterministic, CF-re-derivable contract.

first_build_sequence.what: Sandbox runner in cat-05 watcher -> SandboxJob[] (inspect|patch_diff|test); stage diffs, never apply.
first_build_sequence.why: Bounded execution with authority=none against the founder's TARGET_URL only.

first_build_sequence.what: Verifier: sandbox self-writes field_audit_receipt_v1 (UNVERIFIED); independent CF Worker recomputes summary + edge/secondary-account proof to issue PASS/FAIL.
first_build_sequence.why: The ONLY PASS issuer is the independent Worker; mirrors category_cloud_task_receipt_v1 doctrine.

first_build_sequence.what: Approval queue -> ApprovalItem[] from receipts + staged diffs.
first_build_sequence.why: Human gate; canonical changes require an approved item, never raw voice.

first_build_sequence.what: Pattern expander -> fan each contract across sibling routes/components; enqueue expanded contracts.
first_build_sequence.why: One spoken defect becomes surface-wide coverage deterministically.
